sglang.title: Fix weight update for data parallelism
sglang.author: merrymercy

sglang.title: Support DP MLA
sglang.author: ispobock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Support data parallel on MLA for DeepSeek model to reduce replicated KV cache.
python -m sglang.launch_server --model-path neuralmagic/DeepSeek-Coder-V2-Instruct-FP8 --trust-remote-code --tp 8 --dp 8 --enable-dp-attention

Modifications

Add --enable-dp-attention option. When it is turned

sglang.title: Fix illegal memory access in overlap mode & Use more fused triton kernels for building meta data
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Fix illegal memory access in overlap model by introducing a synchronization
Implement some fused triton kernels for building the metadata of prefill
Simplify copy queue in overlap model

sglang.title: Launch dp ranks in parallel
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt: This can accelerate the model launching

vllm.title: [misc][plugin] improve log messages
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: improve logging information to avoid confusing users.

vllm.title: [BugFix] [Kernel] Fix GPU SEGV occuring in fused_moe kernel
vllm.author: rasmith
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
When running a large model (~500G), I encountered GPU SEGV. It was occurring in fused_moe_kernel:
Thread 98 "python" received signal SIGSEGV, Segmentation fault.
Warning: precise memory violation signal reporting is not enabled, reported
location may not be accurate.  See "show amdgpu precise-memory

vllm.title: [Misc] Update benchmark to support image_url file or http
vllm.author: kakao-steve-ai
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
For testing ShareGPT4V dataset in benchmarks/benchmark_serving.py, the part setting image_url was updated slightly.
Client Usage:
python3 benchmarks/benchmark_serving.py --backend openai-chat \
    --base-url http://127.0.0.1:8000/v1 \
    --endpoint /chat/completions \
    --model llava-hf/llava-v1

vllm.title: [Misc] Medusa supports custom bias
vllm.author: skylee-01
vllm.bodyExcerpt: In the production environment, some services provide weights with bias, and some weights are not biased. Here is a flexible configuration option.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix M-RoPE position calculation when chunked prefill is enabled
vllm.author: imkero
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix MRotaryEmbedding's get_input_positions when chunked prefill is enabled.
It only slice at the left-hand side of generated llm_positions currently (forgetting the right-hand side). This PR add right-hand slice position in it to support chunked prefill.

  
    
      vllm/vllm/model_executor/layer

vllm.title: [2/N][torch.compile] make compilation cfg part of vllm cfg
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
continue of #10237
move vllm.compilation.config into vllm.config
it is still controlled by the env var, but in the core code, no one should read the env var.
TODO:

move the env var to cli arg.
remove compilation context, initialize all config fields during init, rather than during model forward tim

vllm.title: [V1] Refactor model executable interface for all text-only language models
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR refactors the interface of all text-only decoder language models for V1 VLM re-arch and torch.compile support. In particular, all model implementations on vLLM will need to meet the following requirements:

get_input_embeddings(input_ids) implemented in XYZModel
get_input_embeddings(input_id
